+# Created by: Jose Alonso Cardenas Marquez <acardenas@bsd.org.pe>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTREVISION=	0
 CATEGORIES=	archivers lang

 WRKUNITDIR=	${FPCSRCDIR}/packages/${PKGNAMESUFFIX:S/-//}
